name: Occultic Curse Kiss
outcome: An eerie glow covers [AttackerName] as she possessively stirs up [TargetName]'s mouth with her long tongue, sending gooey pulses of dark magic into [TargetHimOrHer] through the passionate liplock, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] dumbly kissing back with meek affection, gazing into her enchanting amethyst eyes in dazed infatuation.
miss: An eerie glow covers [AttackerName] as she possessively stirs up [TargetName]'s mouth with her long tongue, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to endure the intense stimulation!
statusOutcome: As her tongue tip traces a dark symbol upon [TargetName]'s vulnerable tongue, an explosive mind-rattling burst of sinful bliss resonates directly into [TargetHisOrHer] brain, crackling [TargetHisOrHer] will to resist, making the temptation to just give in to [AttackerName] stronger than ever...
